query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS shared_workflow_templates (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  template_id VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  template_name VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
  template_description TEXT,
  template_category VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  template_data JSON NOT NULL,
  shared_by_user_id INT NOT NULL,
  shared_by_name VARCHAR(200),
  status ENUM('pending', 'approved', 'rejected') DEFAULT 'pending',
  downloads INT DEFAULT 0,
  rating DECIMAL(3,2) DEFAULT 0,
  rating_count INT DEFAULT 0,
  reviewer_id INT,
  reviewer_comment TEXT,
  reviewed_at DATETIME,
  tags JSON,
  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_status (status),
  INDEX idx_category (template_category),
  INDEX idx_shared_by (shared_by_user_id)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nC6sHo9eqXDn4Lp.root --database SPWUc63a3tjYuzCxiuEomB --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS shared_workflow_templates (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  template_id VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  template_name VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
  template_description TEXT,
  template_category VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  template_data JSON NOT NULL,
  shared_by_user_id INT NOT NULL,
  shared_by_name VARCHAR(200),
  status ENUM('pending', 'approved', 'rejected') DEFAULT 'pending',
  downloads INT DEFAULT 0,
  rating DECIMAL(3,2) DEFAULT 0,
  rating_count INT DEFAULT 0,
  reviewer_id INT,
  reviewer_comment TEXT,
  reviewed_at DATETIME,
  tags JSON,
  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_status (status),
  INDEX idx_category (template_category),
  INDEX idx_shared_by (shared_by_user_id)
);
